title: SAP Diagrams Pro — Shape Index
description: Catalog of SAP BTP draw.io shapes extracted from the official btp-solution-diagrams repo. Used by sap-icons-resolve and sap-diagram-generate to look up the correct icon style for a named SAP service.

sourceCommit.description: Git short SHA of btp-solution-diagrams at index build time.

overridesApplied.description: Number of CSV override entries applied at build time.

sets.description: The 7 official SAP shape library sets.

services.description: Flat list of services with their draw.io shape style snippets (S/M/L sizes).

name.description: User-friendly canonical SAP service name from the shape's `value` field, post CSV override (e.g. 'SAP Build Process Automation').

techId.description: Original tech ID from the SAP library (e.g. '20002-sap-build-process-automation_sd'). Preserved as alias for backwards compatibility.

aliases.description: Aliases for resolution: tech ID, acronyms, common short forms, CSV-curated additions.

drawioStyle.description: The full draw.io style attribute string (e.g. 'shape=mxgraph.sap.icons.bpa;...').

iconUrl.description: Optional: URL to the SVG icon.
